    22	class NodeHelper:
    23	    """节点助手"""
    24

    31	    def __init__(
    32	        self,
    33	        level1_correct: bool = True,
    34	        level2_correct: bool = True,
    35	        level3_correct: bool = True,

    45	    def to_json_noinner(self, fp: TextIOWrapper) -> None:
    46	        fprint(fp, "\n>---")
    47	        ast0_noinner = self.ast0.copy()
    48	        ast1_noinner = self.ast1.copy()
    49	        for key in ["inner", "id"]:
    50	            if key in ast0_noinner:
    51	                del ast0_noinner[key]
    52	            if key in ast1_noinner:
    53	                del ast1_noinner[key]
    54	        fprint(fp, "\n标准答案节点: \n" + str(ast0_noinner))
    55	        fprint(fp, "\n用户答案节点: \n" + str(ast1_noinner))
    56	        fprint(fp, "\n<---")
    57	        return
    58	
    59	    def to_json_inner_n(self, fp: TextIOWrapper, inner_n: int) -> None:
    60	        fprint(fp, "\n>---")
    61	        ast0_copy = self.ast0.copy()
    62	        ast1_copy = self.ast1.copy()
    63	        for key in ["id"]:
    64	            if key in ast0_copy:
    65	                del ast0_copy[key]
    66	            if key in ast1_copy:
    67	                del ast1_copy[key]
    68	        ast0_inner_n = None
    69	        ast1_inner_n = None
    70	        for key in ["inner"]:
    71	            if key in ast0_copy:
    72	                ast0_inner_n = ast0_copy[key][inner_n]
    73	                del ast0_copy[key]
    74	            if key in ast1_copy:
    75	                ast1_inner_n = ast1_copy[key][inner_n]
    76	                del ast1_copy[key]
    77	        fprint(fp, "\n标准答案节点: \n" + str(ast0_copy))
    78	        fprint(fp, "\n标准答案节点inner的第n项: \n" + str(ast0_inner_n))
    79	        fprint(fp, "\n用户答案节点: \n" + str(ast1_copy))
    80	        fprint(fp, "\n用户答案节点inner的第n项: \n" + str(ast1_inner_n))
    81	        fprint(fp, "\n<---")
    82	        return
    83	
    84	    def to_yaml(
    85	        self, fp: TextIOWrapper, lv: int, key_to_add: list, inner_err_idx: list
    86	    ) -> None:
    87	        fprint(
    88	            fp, "\n>----------------------------对比开始----------------------------"
    89	        )
    90	        ast0_cp = dict()
    91	        ast1_cp = dict()
    92	        for key in key_to_add:
    93	            ast0_cp[key] = self.ast0.get(key)
    94	            ast1_cp[key] = self.ast1.get(key)
    95	        if len(inner_err_idx) > 0:
    96	            ast0_cp["inner"] = []
    97	            ast1_cp["inner"] = []
    98	        inner_cp_idx = 0
    99	        for i in inner_err_idx:
   100	            for j in range(inner_cp_idx, i):
   101	                ast0_cp["inner"].append("...")
   102	                ast1_cp["inner"].append("...")
   103	            ast0_cp["inner"].append(self.ast0["inner"][i])
   104	            ast1_cp["inner"].append(self.ast1["inner"][i])
   105	            inner_cp_idx = i + 1
   106	        fprint(fp, "\n标准答案节点: \n" + yaml.dump(ast0_cp))
   107	        fprint(fp, "\n用户答案节点: \n" + yaml.dump(ast1_cp))
   108	        fprint(
   109	            fp,
   110	            "\n<----------------------------对比结束----------------------------\n\n",
   111	        )
   112	        return

   114	    def to_dot(self, fp: TextIOWrapper) -> None:
   115	        pass
   116	
   117	    def check_key(self, key: str, key_level: int) -> tuple:
   118	        value0 = self.ast0.get(key)
   119	        level_output = ""
   120	        if value0 is None:
   121	            return True, level_output
   122	        value1 = self.get_value1(key, key_level)
   123	        if value1 is None:
   124	            level_output += "\n键 '" + key + "' 在用户答案节点内不存在"
   125	            return False, level_output
   126	        if type(value0) is not type(value1):
   127	            level_output += "\n键 '" + key + "' 对应的值类型错误"
   128	            return False, level_output
   129	        if key == "type":
   130	            qualType0 = value0.get("qualType")
   131	            qualType1 = value1.get("qualType")
   132	            if qualType0 is None:
   133	                return True, level_output
   134	            if qualType1 is None or qualType0 != qualType1:
   135	                level_output += "\n键 '" + key + "' 的qualType对应值错误"
   136	                return False, level_output
   137	            return True, level_output
   138	        if value0 != value1:
   139	            level_output += "\n键 '" + key + "' 错误"
   140	            return False, level_output
   141	        return True, level_output
   142	
   143	    def get_value1(self, key: str, key_level: int) -> Any:
   144	        # 如果 key 在 ast1 中存在，直接返回对应的值
   145	        if key in self.ast1:
   146	            return self.ast1.get(key)
   147	        self.level3_correct = False
   148	        if key_level == 2:
   149	            self.level2_correct = False
   150	        if key_level == 1:
   151	            self.level2_correct = False
   152	            self.level1_correct = False
   153	        return None
   154	
   155	    @staticmethod
   156	    def filter_value0(value0: list) -> list:
   157	        return list(
   158	            filter(
   159	                lambda x: not x.get("isImplicit", False)
   160	                and not x.get("implicit", False),
   161	                value0,
   162	            )
   163	        )
   164	
   165	    @staticmethod
   166	    def filter_ast(ast: dict) -> None:
   167	        if ast_inner := ast.get("inner"):
   168	            for i in ast_inner:
   169	                NodeHelper.filter_ast(i)
   170	            ast["inner"] = NodeHelper.filter_value0(ast_inner)

   173	class AstHelper:
   174	    """语法树助手"""
   175	
   176	    all_count: int = 0
   177	    level1_all_count: int = 0
   178	    level1_correct_count: int = 0
   179	    level2_correct_count: int = 0
   180	    level3_correct_count: int = 0
   181	
   182	    def __init__(
   183	        self,
   184	        all_count: int = 0,
   185	        level1_all_count: int = 0,
   186	        level1_correct_count: int = 0,
   187	        level2_correct_count: int = 0,
   188	        level3_correct_count: int = 0,
   189	    ):
   190	        self.all_count = all_count
   191	        self.level1_all_count = level1_all_count
   192	        self.level1_correct_count = level1_correct_count
   193	        self.level2_correct_count = level2_correct_count
   194	        self.level3_correct_count = level3_correct_count
   195	
   196	    def inc_all_count(self):
   197	        self.all_count += 1
   198	
   199	    def inc_l1_all_count(self):
   200	        self.level1_all_count += 1
   201	
   202	    def inc_l1_correct_count(self):
   203	        self.level1_correct_count += 1
   204	
   205	    def inc_l2_correct_count(self):
   206	        self.level2_correct_count += 1
   207	
   208	    def inc_l3_correct_count(self):
   209	        self.level3_correct_count += 1
   210	
   211	
   212	class Error(Exception):
   213	    pass
   214	
   215	
   216	def fprint(fp: TextIOWrapper, *args) -> None:
   217	    """输出到fp指向的流
   218	
   219	    :param TextIOWrapper fp: 输出流
   220	    :param Any args: 输出的内容
   221	    """
   222	    print(*args, file=fp)
   223	
   224	
   225	def get_key_level(key: str, kind: str) -> int:
   226	    """获取键值的等级
   227	
   228	    :param str key: 键值
   229	    :return int: 返回键值的等级
   230	    """
   231	    if key in level1_kind:
   232	        return 1
   233	    if key in level2_kind:
   234	        return 2
   235	    if key in key_inner:
   236	        if kind in kind_initlist:
   237	            return 2
   238	        return 1
   239	    return 3
   240	
   241	
   242	def check_ast(
   243	    ast0: Any, ast1: Any, ast_helper: AstHelper, status: int, fp: TextIOWrapper
   244	) -> dict:
   245	    """比较两个 ast 是否相同，采用深度优先遍历
   246	
   247	    :param Any ast0: 标准答案的子树
   248	    :param Any ast1: 输出结果的子树
   249	    :param AstHelper ast_helper: 语法树助手
   250	    :param int status: 状态
   251	        0: 正常，未在 InitListExpr 中
   252	        1: 错误，未在 InitListExpr 中
   253	        2: 正常，在 InitListExpr 中
   254	        3: 错误，在 InitListExpr 中
   255	    :param TextIOWrapper fp: 输出文件
   256	    :return NodeHelper node_helper: 节点助手，记录每一个节点不同等级的正确性
   257	    """
   258	
   259	    ast_helper.inc_all_count()
   260	    if status == 0 or status == 1:
   261	        ast_helper.inc_l1_all_count()
   262	
   263	    # status 为 1 或者 3 时，说明 ast1 在之前已经不匹配了，但还是需要遍历所有节点统计总的节点数
   264	    if status == 1 or status == 3:
   265	        node_helper = NodeHelper(False, False, False, ast0, ast1)
   266	        # 如果有 inner 节点，需要继续遍<response clipped><NOTE>Due to the max output limit, only part of this file has been shown to you. You should retry this tool after you have searched inside the file with `grep -n` in order to find the line numbers of what you are looking for.</NOTE>:
   267	    """评测单个测例，打印出一行评测结果"""
   268	
   269	    name = case.name
   270	    score = 0.0
   271	    max_score = 100.0
   272	    output = "[PASS]"
   273	    weight = case.weight
   274	    output_path, fp = cases_helper.open_case_report(case)
   275	    print(output_path, end=" ... ", flush=True)
   276	
   277	    with fp:
   278	        try:
   279	            # 如果没有 answer.json 文件，零分
   280	            std_answer_path = cases_helper.of_case_bindir("answer.json", case)
   281	            if not osp.exists(std_answer_path):
   282	                output = "没有可参考的标准答案"
   283	                fprint(fp, "标准参考答案文件不存在：", std_answer_path)
   284	                raise Error()
   285	
   286	            # 如果没有 output.json 文件，零分
   287	            judge_answer_path = cases_helper.of_case_bindir("output.json", case)
   288	            if not osp.exists(judge_answer_path):
   289	                output = "没有输出结果"
   290	                fprint(fp, "输出结果文件不存在：", judge_answer_path)
   291	                raise Error()
   292	
   293	            # 读取标准答案
   294	            try:
   295	                with open(std_answer_path, "r") as f:
   296	                    std_answer = json.load(f)
   297	                    gc.collect()
   298	            except Exception as e:
   299	                output = "标准答案文件损坏"
   300	                fprint(fp, "标准答案文件损坏：", std_answer_path)
   301	                raise Error(e)
   302	            # 转化成 yaml 格式和 simplied.json 格式输出
   303	            try:
   304	                NodeHelper.filter_ast(std_answer)
   305	                # 简化 answer.yaml, 删除不需要的 key
   306	                simplied_std_answer = remove_keys(std_answer, keys_to_remove)
   307	                with open(cases_helper.of_case_bindir("answer.yaml", case), "w") as f:
   308	                    f.write(yaml.dump(simplied_std_answer))
   309	                with open(
   310	                    cases_helper.of_case_bindir("answer.simplied.json", case), "w"
   311	                ) as f:
   312	                    json.dump(simplied_std_answer, f, indent=2)
   313	            except Exception as e:
   314	                output = "转化为yaml失败"
   315	                fprint(fp, "转化为yaml失败")
   316	                raise Error(e)
   317	
   318	            # 读取输出结果
   319	            try:
   320	                with open(judge_answer_path, "r") as f:
   321	                    judge_answer = json.load(f)
   322	                    gc.collect()
   323	            except Exception as e:
   324	                output = "输出结果文件损坏"
   325	                fprint(fp, "输出结果文件损坏：", judge_answer_path)
   326	                raise Error(e)
   327	            # 转化成 yaml 格式输出
   328	            try:
   329	                NodeHelper.filter_ast(judge_answer)
   330	                with open(cases_helper.of_case_bindir("output.yaml", case), "w") as f:
   331	                    f.write(yaml.dump(judge_answer))
   332	            except Exception as e:
   333	                output = "转化为yaml失败"
   334	                fprint(fp, "转化为yaml失败")
   335	                raise Error(e)
   336	            # 重新整理 json 排版
   337	            try:
   338	                judge_answer = move_inner_to_end(judge_answer)
   339	                with open(cases_helper.of_case_bindir("output.json", case), "w") as f:
   340	                    json.dump(judge_answer, f, indent=2)
   341	            except Exception as e:
   342	                output = "重新整理json失败"
   343	                fprint(fp, "重新整理json失败")
   344	                raise Error(e)
   345	
   346	            ast_helper = AstHelper()
   347	            node_helper = NodeHelper()
   348	            # 比较标准答案和输出结果
   349	            check_ast(std_answer, judge_answer, ast_helper, 0, fp)
   350	
   351	            fprint(fp, "")
   352	            fprint(fp, "生成树节点总数:" + f"{ast_helper.all_count}")
   353	            fprint(fp, "生成树中level1节点总数:" + f"{ast_helper.level1_all_count}")
   354	            fprint(
   355	                fp,
   356	                "level1: kind, name, value正确:"
   357	                + f"{ast_helper.level1_correct_count}/{ast_helper.level1_all_count}",
   358	            )
   359	            fprint(
   360	                fp,
   361	                "level2: type, InitListExpr生成树正确:"
   362	                + f"{ast_helper.level2_correct_count}/{ast_helper.all_count}",
   363	            )
   364	            fprint(
   365	                fp,
   366	                "level3: 除id外其他属性全部正确:"
   367	                + f"{ast_helper.level3_correct_count}/{ast_helper.all_count}",
   368	            )
   369	            score = max_score * (
   370	                ast_helper.level1_correct_count * 0.6 / ast_helper.level1_all_count
   371	                + ast_helper.level2_correct_count * 0.4 / ast_helper.all_count
   372	            )
   373	            fprint(fp, f"得分：{score:.2f}/{max_score:.2f}")
   374	
   375	        except Error:
   376	            pass
   377	
   378	    print(output)
   379	    return ScoreReport.TestEntry(
   380	        name=name,
   381	        score=score,
   382	        max_score=max_score,
   383	        output=output,
   384	        output_path=output_path,
   385	        weight=weight,
   386	    )

   389	def score_all(cases_helper: CasesHelper) -> ScoreReport:
   390	    """评测所有测例，生成成绩单"""
   391	
   392	    score_report = ScoreReport("task2")
   393	
   394	    for case in cases_helper.cases:
   395	        test_entry = score_one(cases_helper, case)
   396	        score_report.tests.append(test_entry)
   397	        gc.collect()
   398	
   399	    score_report.leader_board.append(
   400	        ScoreReport.LeaderBoardEntry(
   401	            "总分",
   402	            score_report.final_score(),
   403	            0,
   404	            True,
   405	            "",
   406	        )
   407	    )
   408	
   409	    return score_report
   410	
   411	
   412	if __name__ == "__main__":
   413	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser("实验二评测脚本")
   414	    parser.add_argument("srcdir", type=str, help="测例目录")
   415	    parser.add_argument("bindir", type=str, help="测评输出目录")
   416	    parser.add_argument("cases_file", type=str, help="测例表路径")
   417	    parser.add_argument("ctest_exe", type=str, help="CTest 程序路径")
   418	    parser.add_argument("log_level", type=int, help="日志等级")
   419	    parser.add_argument("--single", type=str, help="运行单个测例")
   420	    parser.add_argument("--diy-mod", action="store_true", help="diy 模式:")
   421	    args = parser.parse_args()
   422	    print_parsed_args(parser, args)
   423	
   424	    print("加载测例表...", end="", flush=True)
   425	    cases_helper = CasesHelper.load_file(
   426	        args.srcdir,
   427	        args.bindir,
   428	        args.cases_file,
   429	    )
   430	    print("完成")
   431	
   432	    log_level = args.log_level
   433	
   434	    ctest_cases = "^task2/" if not args.diy_mod else "^task2-diy/"
   435	    # diy 模式下 bindir 是输出子目录，CTestTestfile.cmake 在其父目录中
   436	    ctest_dir = osp.dirname(args.bindir) if args.diy_mod else args.bindir
   437	
   438	    if case_name := args.single:
   439	        for case in cases_helper.cases:
   440	            if case.name == case_name:
   441	                break
   442	        else:
   443	            print("没有找到指定的测例：", case_name)
   444	            sys.exit(1)
   445	
   446	        # 通过 CTest 运行同学们的代码
   447	        case_outerr = cases_helper.open_case_outerr(case, "ctest")
   448	        out_path, out, err_path, err = case_outerr
   449	        print("CTest 运行日志：", out_path, err_path)
   450	        print("运行 CTest 以得到结果...", end="", flush=True)
   451	        with out, err:
   452	            subps.run(
   453	                [
   454	                    args.ctest_exe,
   455	                    "--test-dir",
   456	                    ctest_dir,
   457	                    "-R",
   458	                    ctest_cases + case_name,
   459	                    # 注意这里一定不能写成 test2/，否则会无限递归下去
   460	                ],
   461	                stdout=out,
   462	                stderr=err,
   463	            )
   464	        print("完成")
   465	
   466	        score_one(cases_helper, case)
   467	        print("评测结果已保存：", cases_helper.of_case_bindir("score.txt", case))
   468	
   469	    else:
   470	        # 通过 CTest 运行同学们的代码
   471	        out_path, out, err_path, err = cases_helper.open_outerr("ctest")
   472	        print("CTest 运行日志：", out_path, err_path)
   473	        print("运行 CTest 以得到结果...", end="", flush=True)
   474	        with out, err:
   475	            subps.run(
   476	                [args.ctest_exe, "--test-dir", ctest_dir, "-R", ctest_cases + ".*"],
   477	                stdout=out,
   478	                stderr=err,
   479	            )
   480	        print("完成")
   481	
   482	        # 评分，生成成绩单
   483	        print()
   484	        score_report = score_all(cases_helper)
   485	        print()
   486	
   487	        print("=" * 80)
   488	        score_report.print()
   489	        print("=" * 80)
   490	
   491	        # 保存成绩单
   492	        txt_path, f = cases_helper.open_root_report()
   493	        with f:
   494	            score_report.dump_human_text(f)
   495	        print("成绩单已保存：", cases_helper.of_bindir("score.txt"))
   496	
   497	        json_path, f = cases_helper.open_autograder_json()
   498	        with f:
   499	            score_report.dump_autograder(f)
   500	        print("JSON 格式：", cases_helper.of_bindir("score.json"))
